message:
fix: propagate errors from ShowMultiple and add missing flags to slot commands

ShowMultiple was swallowing all bd show errors, making it impossible to
distinguish missing IDs from database failures. Now returns the error.
runSlotSet/runSlotClear were missing --no-daemon and --allow-stale flags
that b.run() provides, risking daemon IPC issues and stale db failures.

Fixes gt-9xqg1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
